params.SpellDescription: Cast this spell only during your turn and only during combat before blockers are declared. You choose which creatures block this combat and how those creatures block. Whenever a creature attacks and isn't blocked this combat, untap it and remove it from combat.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Cast this spell only during your turn and only during combat before blockers are declared. You choose which creatures block this combat and how those creatures block. Whenever a creature attacks and isn't blocked this combat, untap it and remove it from combat.
